mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charge_detail cd JOIN charge_order co ON co.id = cd.charge_order_id WHERE cd.biz_type = #{bizType} AND cd.biz_id = #{bizId} AND co.pay_status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO charge_detail (charge_order_id, biz_type, biz_id, item_name, amount) VALUES
(#{d.chargeOrderId}, #{d.bizType}, #{d.bizId}, #{d.itemName}, #{d.amount})
